title: carex gracilis subsp. eugracilis
intro: Carex gracilis subsp. eugracilis, also known as slender tufted sedge, is a subspecies of the Carex gracilis plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex gracilis subsp. eugracilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Carex gracilis subsp. eugracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
